title: Replica Army K6-3 Plastic Special Forces Helmet, Black
features: Authentic Reproduction: This helmet is a realistic replica of the iconic K6-3 helmet.
Durable Construction: Crafted from high-quality plastic, ensuring long-lasting durability and resistance to impacts.
Adjustable Fit: Features a secure chin strap and internal padding system for a comfortable, customisable fit.
Distinctive Design: Boasts the signature aesthetic of the K6-3 helmet, with its distinctive shape and riveted construction.
Versatile Use: Suitable for military enthusiasts, historical reenactments, airsoft events, or costume purposes.
description: Immerse yourself in the world of military gear with this K6 helmet replica. Crafted from durable plastic, this helmet captures the iconic design of the K6-3 model used by Special Forces. With its rugged appearance and attention to detail, this replica offers an authentic look and feel.
